<html>
	<body>
		<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse: collapse;font-family:Arial;font-size:10pt;color:#000;background-color:transparent;">
			<tr style="height:22.5pt">
				<td style="width:60pt;white-space:nowrap;vertical-align:bottom;border-right:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-top:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(122,213,146);"><span style="vertical-align:baseline;"></span></td>
				<td style="width:141pt;white-space:nowrap;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;border-right:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-top:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(122,213,146);"><span style="vertical-align:baseline;">Mi, 22.7</span></td>
				<td style="width:141pt;white-space:nowrap;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;border-right:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-top:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(122,213,146);"><span style="vertical-align:baseline;">Do, 23.7</span></td>
				<td style="width:141pt;white-space:nowrap;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;border-right:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-top:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(122,213,146);"><span style="vertical-align:baseline;">Fr, 24.7</span></td>
				<td style="width:141pt;white-space:nowrap;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;border-right:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-top:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(122,213,146);"><span style="vertical-align:baseline;">Sa, 25.7</span></td>
				<td style="width:141pt;white-space:nowrap;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;border-right:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-top:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(122,213,146);"><span style="vertical-align:baseline;">So, 26.7</span></td>
			</tr>
			<tr style="height:80.25pt">
				<td style="width:60pt;white-space:normal;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;border-right:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-top:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(122,213,146);"><span style="vertical-align:baseline;">Vormittag</span></td>
				<td colspan="1" rowspan="3" style="width:141pt;white-space:normal;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;border-right:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-top:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(216,216,216);"><span style="color:rgb(0,97,0);font-size:11pt;vertical-align:baseline;"></span></td>
				<td style="width:141pt;white-space:normal;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;border-right:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-top:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(198,239,206);"><span style="color:rgb(0,97,0);font-size:11pt;vertical-align:baseline;">😎Chill</span></td>
				<td colspan="1" rowspan="2" style="width:141pt;white-space:normal;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;border-right:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-top:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(198,239,206);"><span style="color:rgb(0,97,0);font-size:11pt;vertical-align:baseline;">🏞️ ‍Ausflug</span></td>
				<td style="width:141pt;white-space:normal;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;border-right:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-top:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(198,239,206);"><span style="color:rgb(0,97,0);font-size:11pt;vertical-align:baseline;">🧘Yoga (ab 10h)</span></td>
				<td style="width:141pt;white-space:normal;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;border-right:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-top:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(198,239,206);"><span style="color:rgb(0,97,0);font-size:11pt;vertical-align:baseline;">Brunch &amp; Abschluss (ca 12)</span></td>
			</tr>
			<tr style="height:40.5pt">
				<td colspan="1" rowspan="2" style="width:60pt;white-space:normal;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;border-right:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-top:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(122,213,146);"><span style="vertical-align:baseline;">Nachmittag</span></td>
				<td colspan="1" rowspan="2" style="width:141pt;white-space:normal;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;border-right:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-top:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(198,239,206);"><span style="color:rgb(0,97,0);font-size:11pt;vertical-align:baseline;">🏞️ Kurzausflug</span></td>
				<td style="width:141pt;white-space:normal;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;border-right:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-top:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(198,239,206);"><span style="color:rgb(0,97,0);font-size:11pt;vertical-align:baseline;">Vorbereitungen</span></td>
				<td style="width:141pt;white-space:normal;vertical-align:middle;border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-top:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(216,216,216);"><span style="color:rgb(0,97,0);font-size:11pt;vertical-align:baseline;"></span></td>
			</tr>
			<tr style="height:40.5pt">
				<td style="width:141pt;white-space:normal;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;border-right:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-top:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(198,239,206);"><span style="color:rgb(0,97,0);font-size:11pt;vertical-align:baseline;">🍰Kaffee&amp;Kuchen (16h)</span></td>
				<td style="width:141pt;white-space:normal;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;border-right:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-top:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(198,239,206);"><span style="color:rgb(0,97,0);font-size:11pt;vertical-align:baseline;">💃Tanzshow (16h)</span></td>
				<td style="width:141pt;white-space:normal;vertical-align:middle;border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(216,216,216);"><span style="color:rgb(0,97,0);font-size:11pt;vertical-align:baseline;"></span></td>
			</tr>
			<tr style="height:80.25pt">
				<td style="width:60pt;white-space:normal;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;border-right:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-top:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(122,213,146);"><span style="vertical-align:baseline;">Abend</span></td>
				<td style="width:141pt;white-space:normal;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;border-right:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-top:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(198,239,206);"><span style="color:rgb(0,97,0);font-size:11pt;vertical-align:baseline;">🔥Grillabend</span></td>
				<td style="width:141pt;white-space:normal;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;border-right:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-top:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(198,239,206);"><span style="color:rgb(0,97,0);font-size:11pt;vertical-align:baseline;">🏓 Lagerfeuer &amp; Spiele</span></td>
				<td style="width:141pt;white-space:normal;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;border-right:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-top:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(198,239,206);">
					<span style="color:rgb(0,97,0);font-size:11pt;vertical-align:baseline;">
						Abendessen, Spiele
						<br />
						<br />
						🎬 Openair Kino (ab 21h)
					</span>
				</td>
				<td style="width:141pt;white-space:normal;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;border-right:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);border-top:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(198,239,206);">
					<span style="color:rgb(0,97,0);font-size:11pt;vertical-align:baseline;">
						🎼 Konzert (17h)
						<br />
						<br />
						𓌉◯𓇋 Festtafel (19h)
						<br />
						<br />
						🎉 Party (21h)
					</span>
				</td>
				<td style="width:141pt;white-space:normal;vertical-align:middle;border-bottom:1px solid rgb(63,63,63);border-left:1px solid rgb(0,0,0);background-color:rgb(216,216,216);"><span style="color:rgb(0,97,0);font-size:11pt;vertical-align:baseline;"></span></td>
			</tr>
		</table>
	</body>
</html>
